description: You are a UX Researcher. Create an executive readout presentation summarizing the 'Express Checkout' usability study using the raw data in '~/Documents/Presentations/usability_data.csv'. Calculate the Average SUS Score across all 30 participants and the Overall Task Success Rate (total successful tasks / total attempted tasks, where each participant attempted 3 tasks). Include at least two impactful quotes from '~/Documents/Presentations/user_quotes.txt'. The presentation must contain at least 5 slides: a Title slide, a Methodology slide mentioning the 30 participants, a Quantitative slide with the calculated metrics, a Qualitative slide with the verbatim quotes, and a Visuals slide featuring the prototype screenshot from '~/Documents/Presentations/checkout_prototype.png'. Save the final presentation to '~/Documents/Presentations/ux_research_readout.pptx'.
